definition: solid with two triangular/ trapezoidal faces created by intersecting a block with a plane perpendicular to one of its faces

definition_ml.en: solid with two triangular/ trapezoidal faces created by intersecting a block with a plane perpendicular to one of its faces

note: The trapezoidal faces may be degenerated to triangular ones.||NOTE 2  The property axis2_placement3d specifies the local coordinate system of the right angular wedge whereas the property location specifies the position of the origin of the local coordinate system within the geometric context.

note_ml.en: The trapezoidal faces may be degenerated to triangular ones.||NOTE 2  The property axis2_placement3d specifies the local coordinate system of the right angular wedge whereas the property location specifies the position of the origin of the local coordinate system within the geometric context.

raw_properties.MDC_P008.en: The trapezoidal faces may be degenerated to triangular ones.||NOTE 2  The property axis2_placement3d specifies the local coordinate system of the right angular wedge whereas the property location specifies the position of the origin of the local coordinate system within the geometric context.
